events.content: Created PR #2512 worktree, read all 4 unresolved review threads with get_unresolved_review_threads.py and get_thread_conversation_history.py, and started docs/session-log fixes.
Fixed Phase-1 baseline pointer to issue #2478 deliverable instead of a missing file path.
Corrected roadmap CI evidence to cite roadmap.md:14 and roadmap.md:40 while naming the actual deterministic-CI coverage-map gap.
Corrected devops actionable-examples evidence to acknowledge devops.md:300-307 and focus the fix on examples plus suppression rules.
Added schemaVersion and evidence to session log 2379; added schemaVersion to this session log.
